zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏强，维持高位整理
zh.content:
当前BTC/USD维持在77600美元附近运行，价格站稳20日均线之上，说明中短期趋势仍偏多。24小时波动区间较窄，多头虽未明显放量，但整体买盘承接较稳定，市场情绪偏谨慎乐观。

从技术指标观察，MACD数值维持正区间，表明多头动能仍在延续，不过缺少信号线配合，短线趋势确认度有限。SMA20位于77230附近，形成当前重要动态支撑，价格回踩后仍具反弹条件。

短期支撑区域关注77400至77200美元，一旦跌破，可能测试77000整数关口。上方阻力集中在77700至78000美元区域，若放量突破，高位有望进一步打开上行空间，推动趋势延续。

操作策略上，激进交易者可依托77200附近轻仓顺势做多，止损设置于77000下方。稳健投资者则建议等待突破78000后再跟进，以确认新一轮上涨结构，避免高位震荡带来的假突破风险。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin continues to trade in a firm short-term uptrend, holding near 77,700 after reaching the session high around 77,688. Price action remains constructive above the 20-period simple moving average at 77,230, suggesting buyers are still controlling momentum despite limited intraday volatility. The narrow trading range between 77,398 and 77,688 indicates consolidation near local highs rather than aggressive profit-taking, which is typically viewed as a bullish continuation signal if support levels remain intact.

Momentum indicators also lean positive. The MACD value at 172.05 reflects strengthening upside momentum and confirms the recent bullish structure, even though the signal line is unavailable for a complete crossover assessment. RSI data is currently unavailable, but price behavior itself suggests the market is not yet showing strong exhaustion. Sustained positioning above the SMA(20) reinforces the likelihood that dips may continue attracting buying interest, especially while broader sentiment around Bitcoin remains resilient.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is developing near 77,230, aligned with the moving average and recent consolidation base. A deeper pullback could expose 77,000 as a psychological support zone, followed by 76,500 if selling pressure accelerates. On the upside, resistance sits around 77,700, with a breakout above this level potentially opening the path toward 78,200 and possibly 79,000 in the near term. Volume confirmation would be important for validating any breakout attempt.

Traders may consider maintaining a cautiously bullish bias while Bitcoin holds above the 77,200–77,300 region. Short-term buyers could look for continuation entries on pullbacks toward support, while breakout traders may wait for a decisive move above 77,700 before increasing exposure. Risk management remains essential given Bitcoin’s tendency for sharp reversals, so protective stops below key support areas may help reduce downside exposure during periods of elevated volatility.
